case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BAUMAN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID EUGENE STINNETT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
